name: rot90
program:
[
  set_y(param1, param1.x),
  sub(param1.max_y, param1.y),
  del(param1),
  set_x(N+0, N+1),
  del(N+0),
  del(N+0)
]

name: rot180
program:
[
  sub(param1.max_x, param1.x),
  set_x(param1, N+1),
  del(N+1),
  sub(param1.max_y, param1.y),
  del(param1),
  set_y(N+0, N+1),
  del(N+0),
  del(N+0)
]

name: rot270
program:
[
  set_x(param1, param1.y),
  sub(param1.max_x, param1.x),
  del(param1),
  set_y(N+0, N+1),
  del(N+0),
  del(N+0)
]

name: flip_h
program:
[
  sub(param1.max_x, param1.x),
  set_pixels(param1, N+1, param1.y, param1.c),
  del(param1),
  del(N+0)
]

name: flip_v
program:
[
  sub(param1.max_y, param1.y),
  set_pixels(param1, param1.x, N+1, param1.c),
  del(param1),
  del(N+0)
]

name: concat_h
program:
[
  add(param2.width, param2.x),
  set_pixels(param1, N+2, param1.y, param2.c),
  del(N+0),
  del(N+0),
  del(N+0)
]

name: concat_v
program:
[
  add(param2.height, param2.y),
  set_pixels(param1, param1.x, N+2, param2.c),
  del(N+0),
  del(N+0),
  del(N+0)
]
